href="https://www.postgresql.org/docs/9.1/datatype-numeric.html#DATATYPE-SERIAL" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><code>SERIAL</code></a> type</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-19"><a data-card="" href="#examples-19" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="generate-autoincrementing-integers-as-ids-relational-databases-only-1"><a data-card="" href="#generate-autoincrementing-integers-as-ids-relational-databases-only-1" class="peer">Generate autoincrementing integers as IDs (Relational databases only)</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">model</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> User</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  id   </span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">Int</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">    @id</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> @default</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">autoincrement</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">())</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  name </span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">String</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">}</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="sequence"><a data-card="" href="#sequence" class="peer"><code>sequence()</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p><strong>Only supported by CockroachDB</strong> <br/>
The sequence function is only supported by <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/cockroachdb">CockroachDB connector</a>.</p></div></div>
<p>Create a sequence of integers in the underlying database and assign the incremented values to the values of the created records based on the sequence.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="optional-arguments"><a data-card="" href="#optional-arguments" class="peer">Optional arguments</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Argument</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Example</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>virtual</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>@default(sequence(virtual))</code><br/>Virtual sequences are sequences that do not generate monotonically increasing values and instead produce values like those generated by the built-in function <code>unique_rowid()</code>.</td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>cache</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>@default(sequence(cache: 20))</code><br/>The number of sequence values to cache in memory for reuse in the session. A cache size of <code>1</code> means that there is no cache, and cache sizes of less than <code>1</code> are not valid.</td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>increment</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>@default(sequence(increment: 4))</code><br/>The new value by which the sequence is incremented. A negative number creates a descending sequence. A positive number creates an ascending sequence.</td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>minValue</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>@default(sequence(minValue: 10))</code><br/>The new minimum value of the sequence.</td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>maxValue</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>@default(sequence(maxValue: 3030303))</code><br/>The new maximum value of the sequence.</td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>start</code></td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>@default(sequence(start: 2))</code><br/>The value the sequence starts at, if it&#x27;s restarted or if the sequence hits the <code>maxValue</code>.</td></tr></tbody></table></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-20"><a data-card="" href="#examples-20" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="generate-sequencing-integers-as-ids"><a data-card="" href="#generate-sequencing-integers-as-ids" class="peer">Generate sequencing integers as IDs</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="cuid"><a data-card="" href="#cuid" class="peer"><code>cuid()</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Generate a globally unique identifier based on the <a href="https://github.com/ericelliott/cuid" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><code>cuid</code></a> spec.</p>
<p>If you&#x27;d like to use <a href="https://github.com/paralleldrive/cuid2" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><code>cuid2</code></a> values, you can pass <code>2</code> as an argument to the <code>cuid</code> function: <code>cuid(2)</code>.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="remarks-20"><a data-card="" href="#remarks-20" class="peer">Remarks</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<ul>
<li>Compatible with <code>String</code>.</li>
<li>Implemented by Prisma ORM and therefore not &quot;visible&quot; in the underlying database schema. You can still use <code>cuid()</code> when using <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/introspection">introspection</a> by <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-client/setup-and-configuration/custom-model-and-field-names">manually changing your Prisma schema</a> and <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-client/setup-and-configuration/generating-prisma-client">generating Prisma Client</a>, in that case the values will be generated by Prisma&#x27;s <a href="/docs/v6/orm/more/internals/engines">query engine</a>.</li>
<li>Since the length of <code>cuid()</code> output is undefined per the cuid creator, a safe field size is 30 characters, in order to allow for enough characters for very large values. If you set the field size as less than 30, and then a larger value is generated by <code>cuid()</code>, you might see Prisma Client errors such as <code>Error: The provided value for the column is too long for the column&#x27;s type.</code></li>
<li>For <strong>MongoDB</strong>: <code>cuid()</code> does not generate a valid <code>ObjectId</code>. You can use <a href="#generate-objectid-as-ids-mongodb-only"><code>@db.ObjectId</code> syntax</a> if you want to use <code>ObjectId</code> in the underlying database. However, you can still use <code>cuid()</code> if your <code>_id</code> field is not of type <code>ObjectId</code>.</li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-21"><a data-card="" href="#examples-21" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="uuid"><a data-card="" href="#uuid" class="peer"><code>uuid()</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Generate a globally unique identifier based on the <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Universally_unique_identifier" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">UUID</a> spec. Prisma ORM supports versions 4 (default) and 7.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="remarks-21"><a data-card="" href="#remarks-21" class="peer">Remarks</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<ul>
<li>Compatible with <code>String</code>.</li>
<li>Implemented by Prisma ORM and therefore not &quot;visible&quot; in the underlying database schema. You can still use <code>uuid()</code> when using <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/introspection">introspection</a> by <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-client/setup-and-configuration/custom-model-and-field-names">manually changing your Prisma schema</a> and <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-client/setup-and-configuration/generating-prisma-client">generating Prisma Client</a>, in that case the values will be generated by Prisma ORM&#x27;s <a href="/docs/v6/orm/more/internals/engines">query engine</a>.</li>
<li>For <strong>relational databases</strong>: If you do not want to use Prisma ORM&#x27;s <code>uuid()</code> function, you can use <a href="#override-default-value-behavior-for-supported-types">the native database function with <code>dbgenerated</code></a>.</li>
<li>For <strong>MongoDB</strong>: <code>uuid()</code> does not generate a valid <code>ObjectId</code>. You can use <a href="#generate-objectid-as-ids-mongodb-only"><code>@db.ObjectId</code> syntax</a> if you want to use <code>ObjectId</code> in the underlying database. However, you can still use <code>uuid()</code> if your <code>_id</code> field is not of type <code>ObjectId</code>.</li>
</ul>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="ulid"><a data-card="" href="#ulid" class="peer"><code>ulid()</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Generate a universally unique lexicographically sortable identifier based on the <a href="https://github.com/ulid/spec" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">ULID</a> spec.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="remarks-22"><a data-card="" href="#remarks-22" class="peer">Remarks</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<ul>
<li><code>ulid()</code> will produce 128-bit random identifier represented as a 26-character long alphanumeric string, e.g.: <code>01ARZ3NDEKTSV4RRFFQ69G5FAV</code></li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-23"><a data-card="" href="#examples-23" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="nanoid"><a data-card="" href="#nanoid" class="peer"><code>nanoid()</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Generated values based on the <a href="https://github.com/ai/nanoid" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Nano ID</a> spec. <code>nanoid()</code> accepts an integer value between 2 and 255 that specifies the <em>length</em> of the generate ID value, e.g. <code>nanoid(16)</code> will generated ID with 16 characters. If you don&#x27;t provide a value to the nanoid() function, the default value is 21.</p>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>Nano ID is quite comparable to UUID v4 (random-based). It has a similar number of random bits in the ID (126 in Nano ID and 122 in UUID), so it has a similar collision probability:</p><p>For there to be a one in a billion chance of duplication, 103 trillion version 4 IDs must be generated.</p><p>There are two main differences between Nano ID and UUID v4:</p><ul>
<li>Nano ID uses a bigger alphabet, so a similar number of random bits are packed in just 21 symbols instead of 36.</li>
<li>Nano ID code is 4 times smaller than uuid/v4 package: 130 bytes instead of 423.</li>
</ul></div></div>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="remarks-23"><a data-card="" href="#remarks-23" class="peer">Remarks</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<ul>
<li>Compatible with <code>String</code>.</li>
<li>Implemented by Prisma ORM and therefore not &quot;visible&quot; in the underlying database schema. You can still use <code>uuid()</code> when using <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/introspection">introspection</a> by <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-client/setup-and-configuration/custom-model-and-field-names">manually changing your Prisma schema</a> and <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-client/setup-and-configuration/generating-prisma-client">generating Prisma Client</a>, in that case the values will be generated by Prisma ORM&#x27;s <a href="/docs/v6/orm/more/internals/engines">query engine</a>.</li>
<li>For <strong>MongoDB</strong>: <code>nanoid()</code> does not generate a valid <code>ObjectId</code>. You can use <a href="#generate-objectid-as-ids-mongodb-only"><code>@db.ObjectId</code> syntax</a> if you want to use <code>ObjectId</code> in the underlying database. However, you can still use <code>nanoid()</code> if your <code>_id</code> field is not of type <code>ObjectId</code>.</li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-24"><a data-card="" href="#examples-24" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="now"><a data-card="" href="#now" class="peer"><code>now()</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Set a timestamp of the time when a record is created.</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="remarks-24"><a data-card="" href="#remarks-24" class="peer">Remarks</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="general-4"><a data-card="" href="#general-4" class="peer">General</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>
<ul>
<li>Compatible with <a href="#datetime"><code>DateTime</code></a></li>
</ul>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>In versions before <a href="https://github.com/prisma/prisma/releases/tag/4.4.0" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">4.4.0</a>, if you&#x27;re also using <a href="/docs/v6/orm/reference/prisma-schema-reference#updatedat"><code>@updatedAt</code></a>, the time might differ from the <code>now()</code> values if your database and app have different time zones. This happens because <code>@updatedAt</code> operates at the Prisma ORM level, while <code>now()</code> operates at the database level.</p></div></div>
<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="relational-databases-8"><a data-card="" href="#relational-databases-8" class="peer">Relational databases</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Implemented on the database-level, meaning that it manifests in the database schema and can be recognized through introspection. Database implementations:</p>
<div class="relative w-full overflow-auto"><table class="w-full caption-bottom text-sm"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Database</th><th class="h-10 px-3 py-4 text-left align-middle font-medium text-foreground-neutral [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] only:text-xl bg-background-neutral-weaker">Implementation</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">PostgreSQL</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><a href="https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/functions-datetime.html#FUNCTIONS-DATETIME-CURRENT" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><code>CURRENT_TIMESTAMP</code></a> and aliases like <code>now()</code></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">MySQL</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><a href="https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/8.0/en/date-and-time-functions.html#function_current-timestamp" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><code>CURRENT_TIMESTAMP</code></a> and aliases like <code>now()</code></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">SQLite</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><code>CURRENT_TIMESTAMP</code> and aliases like <code>date(&#x27;now&#x27;)</code></td></tr><tr class="border-b transition-colors hover:bg-muted/50 data-[state=selected]:bg-muted"><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default">CockroachDB</td><td class="px-3 py-4 align-middle [&amp;:has([role=checkbox])]:pr-0 [&amp;&gt;[role=checkbox]]:translate-y-[2px] bg-background-default"><a href="https://www.cockroachlabs.com/docs/stable/functions-and-operators#special-syntax-forms" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><code>CURRENT_TIMESTAMP</code></a> and aliases like <code>now()</code></td></tr></tbody></table></div>
</li>
</ul>
<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="mongodb-18"><a data-card="" href="#mongodb-18" class="peer">MongoDB</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>
<ul>
<li>Implemented at Prisma ORM level</li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-25"><a data-card="" href="#examples-25" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>

<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="dbgenerated"><a data-card="" href="#dbgenerated" class="peer"><code>dbgenerated(...)</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Represents <strong>default values</strong> that cannot be expressed in the Prisma schema (such as <code>random()</code>).</p>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="remarks-25"><a data-card="" href="#remarks-25" class="peer">Remarks</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="relational-databases-9"><a data-card="" href="#relational-databases-9" class="peer">Relational databases</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>
<ul>
<li>
<p>Compatible with any scalar type</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Can not be an empty string <code>dbgenerated(&quot;&quot;)</code> in <a href="https://github.com/prisma/prisma/releases/tag/2.21.0" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">2.21.0</a> and later</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>Accepts a <code>String</code> value in <a href="https://github.com/prisma/prisma/releases/tag/2.17.0" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">2.17.0</a> and later, which allows you to:</p>
<ul>
<li><a href="#set-default-value-for-unsupported-type">Set default values for <code>Unsupported</code> types</a></li>
<li><a href="#override-default-value-behavior-for-supported-types">Override default value behavior for supported types</a></li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>String values in <code>dbgenerated(...)</code> might not match what the DB returns as the default value, because values such as strings may be explicitly cast (e.g. <code>&#x27;hello&#x27;::STRING</code>). When a mismatch is present, Prisma Migrate indicates a migration is still needed. You can use <code>prisma db pull</code> to infer the correct value to resolve the discrepancy. (<a href="https://github.com/prisma/prisma/issues/14917" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">Related issue</a>)</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h4 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-26"><a data-card="" href="#examples-26" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h4>
<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="set-default-value-for-unsupported-type"><a data-card="" href="#set-default-value-for-unsupported-type" class="peer">Set default value for <code>Unsupported</code> type</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">circle     Unsupported(&quot;circle&quot;)?   </span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">@default</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">dbgenerated</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&quot;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">&#x27;&lt;(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">10</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">,</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">4</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">),</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">11</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">&gt;&#x27;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">::circle&quot;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">))</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<h5 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="override-default-value-behavior-for-supported-types"><a data-card="" href="#override-default-value-behavior-for-supported-types" class="peer">Override default value behavior for supported types</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h5>
<p>You can also use <code>dbgenerated(...)</code> to set the default value for supported types. For example, in PostgreSQL you can generate UUIDs at the database level rather than rely on Prisma ORM&#x27;s <code>uuid()</code>:</p>
<figure dir="ltr" class="my-4 bg-fd-card rounded-square shiki relative border border-stroke-neutral not-prose overflow-hidden text-sm shiki shiki-themes github-light github-dark has-diff" style="--shiki-light:#24292e;--shiki-dark:#e1e4e8;--shiki-light-bg:#fff;--shiki-dark-bg:#24292e" tabindex="-1"><div class="empty:hidden absolute top-3 right-2 z-2 backdrop-blur-lg rounded-lg text-fd-muted-foreground"><button type="button" class="inline-flex items-center justify-center rounded-md text-sm font-medium transition-colors duration-100 disabled:pointer-events-none disabled:opacity-50 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-fd-ring p-1 [&amp;_svg]:size-4 hover:text-fd-accent-foreground data-checked:text-fd-accent-foreground" aria-label="Copy Text"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-clipboard" aria-hidden="true"><rect width="8" height="4" x="8" y="2" rx="1" ry="1"></rect><path d="M16 4h2a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H6a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V6a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h2"></path></svg></button></div><div role="region" tabindex="0" class="text-[0.8125rem] py-3.5 overflow-auto max-h-[600px] fd-scroll-container focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-inset focus-visible:ring-fd-ring bg-background-default" style="--padding-right:calc(var(--spacing) * 8)"><pre class="min-w-full w-max *:flex *:flex-col"><code><span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">model</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> User</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8"> {</span></span>
<span class="line diff add"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  id   </span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">String</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">  @id</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> @default</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">dbgenerated</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&quot;gen_random_uuid</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">()</span><span style="--shiki-light:#032F62;--shiki-dark:#9ECBFF">&quot;</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">)) </span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">@db.Uuid</span></span>
<span class="line diff remove"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  id   </span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">String</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">  @id</span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0"> @default</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">(</span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">uuid</span><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">()) </span><span style="--shiki-light:#6F42C1;--shiki-dark:#B392F0">@db.Uuid</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">  test </span><span style="--shiki-light:#005CC5;--shiki-dark:#79B8FF">String</span><span style="--shiki-light:#D73A49;--shiki-dark:#F97583">?</span></span>
<span class="line"><span style="--shiki-light:#24292E;--shiki-dark:#E1E4E8">}</span></span></code></pre></div></figure>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p><a href="https://www.postgresql.org/docs/13/functions-uuid.html" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><code>gen_random_uuid()</code> is a PostgreSQL function</a>. To use it in PostgreSQL versions 12.13 and earlier, you must enable the <code>pgcrypto</code> extension.<br/><br/>In Prisma ORM versions 4.5.0 and later, you can declare the <code>pgcrypto</code> extension in your Prisma schema with the <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/postgresql-extensions"><code>postgresqlExtensions</code> preview feature</a>.</p></div></div>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="attribute-argument-types"><a data-card="" href="#attribute-argument-types" class="peer">Attribute argument types</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="fieldreference"><a data-card="" href="#fieldreference" class="peer"><code>FieldReference[]</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>An array of <a href="#model-fields">field</a> names: <code>[id]</code>, <code>[firstName, lastName]</code></p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="string-1"><a data-card="" href="#string-1" class="peer"><code>String</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>A variable length text in double quotes: <code>&quot;&quot;</code>, <code>&quot;Hello World&quot;</code>, <code>&quot;Alice&quot;</code></p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="expression"><a data-card="" href="#expression" class="peer"><code>Expression</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>An expression that can be evaluated by Prisma ORM: <code>42.0</code>, <code>&quot;&quot;</code>, <code>Bob</code>, <code>now()</code>, <code>cuid()</code></p>
<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="enum"><a data-card="" href="#enum" class="peer"><code>enum</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p><strong>Not supported Microsoft SQL Server</strong> <br/>
The <a href="/docs/v6/orm/overview/databases/sql-server">Microsoft SQL Server connector</a> does not support the <code>enum</code> type.</p></div></div>
<p>Defines an <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/data-model/models#defining-enums">enum</a> .</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="remarks-26"><a data-card="" href="#remarks-26" class="peer">Remarks</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<ul>
<li>Enums are natively supported by <a href="https://www.postgresql.org/docs/current/datatype-enum.html" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">PostgreSQL</a> and <a href="https://dev.mysql.com/doc/refman/8.0/en/enum.html" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">MySQL</a></li>
<li>Enums are implemented and enforced at Prisma ORM level in SQLite and MongoDB</li>
</ul>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="naming-conventions-2"><a data-card="" href="#naming-conventions-2" class="peer">Naming conventions</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<ul>
<li>Enum names must start with a letter (they are typically spelled in <a href="http://wiki.c2.com/?PascalCase" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">PascalCase</a>)</li>
<li>Enums must use the singular form (e.g. <code>Role</code> instead of <code>role</code>, <code>roles</code> or <code>Roles</code>).</li>
<li>Must adhere to the following regular expression: <code>[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*</code></li>
</ul>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-27"><a data-card="" href="#examples-27" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>

<h2 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="type"><a data-card="" href="#type" class="peer"><code>type</code></a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h2>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-warning border-none text-foreground-warning [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-warning"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>Composite types are available <strong>for MongoDB only</strong>.</p></div></div>
<div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-md border p-4 gap-3 text-sm [&amp;&gt;svg]:left-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:top-4 [&amp;&gt;svg]:w-5 [&amp;&gt;svg]:h-5 alert-admonition flex items-start [&amp;&gt;i]:mt-0.5 bg-background-ppg text-foreground-ppg border-none [&amp;&gt;svg]:text-foreground-ppg"><i class="fa-duotone fa-solid fa-circle-exclamation"></i><div class="[&amp;&gt;*]:first:mt-0 [&amp;&gt;*]:last:mb-0 [&amp; strong]:text-inherit"><p>Composite types are available in versions 3.12.0 and later, and in versions 3.10.0 and later if you enable the <code>mongodb</code> Preview feature flag.</p></div></div>
<p>Defines a <a href="/docs/v6/orm/prisma-schema/data-model/models#defining-composite-types">composite type</a> .</p>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="naming-conventions-3"><a data-card="" href="#naming-conventions-3" class="peer">Naming conventions</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
<p>Type names must:</p>
<ul>
<li>start with a letter (they are typically spelled in <a href="http://wiki.c2.com/?PascalCase" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">PascalCase</a>)</li>
<li>adhere to the following regular expression: <code>[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_]*</code></li>
</ul>
<h3 class="flex scroll-m-28 flex-row items-center gap-2" id="examples-28"><a data-card="" href="#examples-28" class="peer">Examples</a><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-link size-3.5 shrink-0 text-fd-muted-foreground opacity-0 transition-opacity peer-hover:opacity-100" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M10 13a5 5 0 0 0 7.54.54l3-3a5 5 0 0 0-7.07-7.07l-1.72 1.71"></path><path d="M14 11a5 5 0 0 0-7.54-.54l-3 3a5 5 0 0 0 7.07 7.07l1.71-1.71"></path></svg></h3>
